title: Authix
description: Protect your server, keep your players safe! With Authix, enjoy a simple, fast, and modern login system.
body:
✨ Features
Secure account system with /register and /login commands
Admin control with /authix reload
/authix help command for showing all available commands and usage
EN/TR translations included (add your own via the languages folder)
Configurable messages through configuration files
Permissions system with fine-grained control
Requires ProtocolLib plugin (soft-depend)
Reloadable configuration without server restart
Support for both SQLite and MySQL databases (configurable in config.yml)

📜 Commands
/register <password> <password> → Register a new account
/login <password> → Login securely
/authix reload → Reload the plugin and configs
/authix help => Show all available commands and usage

🔑 Permissions
authix.use → Basic command usage (default: true)
authix.reload → Reload plugin (default: op)
authix.admin → Admin-level control (default: op)
authix.* → All permissions

⚙️ Configuration
Default language: en_us
Change default language in config.yml
Add your own translations by creating new files in the languages folder
